---
name: 🖥️ Platform Compatibility Report
about: Report how the app works (or doesn't) on your OS
title: "[PLATFORM] "
labels: "platform-testing"
assignees: ""
---

## Platform Details

- **OS**: [e.g., macOS 15.2 Sequoia, Windows 11 24H2]
- **Architecture**: [e.g., x86_64, aarch64/ARM]
- **App Version**: [e.g., v1.0.0-alpha]
- **Installation Method**: [e.g., .dmg, .msi, .AppImage, built from source]

## Installation

- [ ] Downloaded successfully
- [ ] Installed without errors
- [ ] App launches correctly

## Functionality

- [ ] Setup screen renders correctly
- [ ] Track selector scrolls and selects tracks
- [ ] Timer starts and counts down
- [ ] Car moves along track SVG
- [ ] Regulation buttons work (Boost/Overtake/DRS)
- [ ] Penalties trigger correctly
- [ ] Session completes and shows summary
- [ ] Settings open and save correctly
- [ ] Session history persists across restarts

## Issues Found

Describe any issues, with screenshots if possible.

## Overall Assessment

- [ ] ✅ Fully working
- [ ] ⚠️ Working with minor issues
- [ ] ❌ Broken / unusable
